Institute of Care Manifesto

Institute of Care Manifesto. Collaboration with Vienne Chan. Part of the Institute of Care collaborative at the European Media Artists in Residence Exchange (EMARE) with Vienne Chan, Alan Cunningham, and Obsessive Possessive Aggression (OPA, Slobodanka Stevceska and Denis Saraginovski).

Interview with Rob La Frenais at makery.info
